item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 1h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 3h The moment
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 1h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 3h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 2 1 32 2 mil

item.title: Drakesport: Fitzwilliam reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 3h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins.

What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 77 42 882 74 mil
